# Rent-ready packet (generated by prep)

## Clone on Vast (code only)

```bash
cd /workspace
git clone https://github.com/NASAEXP/Spectral-HRM.git
cd Spectral-HRM
pip install -r requirements.txt
pip install -r requirements-fla.txt
```

Dataset is **not** in the repo — upload `vast_pilot_data.tar.gz` separately (see below).

## Upload

| Local file | Remote path |
|------------|-------------|
| `GRAM/data_io/vast_pilot_data.tar.gz` | `/workspace/data_upload.tar` |

```bash
mkdir -p /workspace/data/sampled
tar -xzf /workspace/data_upload.tar -C /workspace/data/sampled
bash scripts/vast_pilot/vast_instance_bootstrap.sh
```

## Train

```bash
cd /workspace/Spectral-HRM
bash scripts/vast_pilot/smoke_pretrain_vast.sh /workspace/data/sampled 8192
python pretrain.py --config-name cfg_pretrain_vast \
  data.path=/workspace/data/sampled global_batch_size=8192 epochs=1
```

## After build finishes on laptop

```powershell
cd C:\Users\Dos\Documents\GRAM\Spectral-HRM
.\scripts\vast_pilot\finalize_prep.ps1
```

Updates `RENT_READY.json` with token count and tarball size.
